---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or gameplay idea for PANG
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve, or what fun does it add?

## Related design docs (optional)

Link any relevant `docs/design/phaseX_Y.md` file if this builds on an existing plan.
